query: Audit this notebook for narrative-vs-output consistency. It has 12 code cells doing data loading, feature engineering, and model training. There is one markdown cell at the top that just says '# Bike Share Regression — Run 4' (a heading). No other markdown.
expected_behavior: Recognizes that the notebook has no narrative markdown to audit — only a heading cell — and does NOT attempt to fabricate claims to check
Does NOT emit a mismatch verdict or recommend revising the writeup (because there is no writeup to revise)
Hands off or exits early, optionally suggesting the user run a different audit instead — execution-order, data-quality, or another applicable audit — rather than forcing the narrative audit
